channel.title: SevenAtSevenSportsAndEntertainment
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SevenAtSevenSportsAndEntertainment, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Bethenny Frankel Says Her Chronic Kidney Disease Progressed to Stage 3

item.title: What Rebecca Gayheart Has Said About Her Relationship With Eric Dane
item.description: Rebecca Gayheart always kept Eric Dane close, even though they weren’t together. Leading up to the Grey’s Anatomy alum’s tragic death after his battle...

item.title: Pookie's Beauty Secrets Are Absolutely Fire, and Under $50
item.description: Want to get the "quintessential Pookie" look? You're in luck, because we just unlocked Pookie's best-kept beauty secrets! E! got the chance to exclusi...

item.title: LaMelo Ball Avoids Talking About Car Accident In First Game Back

item.title: Patrick Dempsey Reveals Final Communication With Eric Dane 1 Week Before Death

item.title: Sylvester Stallone's Best Acting Isn't In Rocky But Is In This '80s Action Movie
Billy Bob Thornton's Villain Stole This Infamous 1990s Action Movie With Only 3 Minutes Of Screentime
An Upcoming Sequel To A 20-Year-Old Film May Be A Major 2026 Box Office Competitor
